channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 今日はガジェット特集です 🎧 ワイヤレスイヤホンやメカニカルキーボード、モバイルバッテリーなど、日々の作業環境を快適に…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日はガジェット特集です 🎧 ワイヤレスイヤホンやメカニカルキーボード、モバイルバッテリーなど、日々の作業環境を快適にしてくれるアイテムは意外と楽天の家電・カメラカテゴリに掘り出し物があります。ミラいわく「環境が整うと、思考も整う」とのこと。ぜひお気に入りの一台を探してみてください 🔍

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #ガジェット
item.content:encoded:
今日はガジェット特集です 🎧 ワイヤレスイヤホンやメカニカルキーボード、モバイルバッテリーなど、日々の作業環境を快適にしてくれるアイテムは意外と楽天の家電・カメラカテゴリに掘り出し物があります。ミラいわく「環境が整うと、思考も整う」とのこと。ぜひお気に入りの一台を探してみてください 🔍

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #ガジェット

item.title: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about R…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about Reanimal! ngl Reanimal was such an incredible experience 🥹 the game had an amazing vibe and a ton of chase scenes that were absolutely thrilling, it was an awesome game! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about Reanimal! ngl Reanimal was such an incredible experience 🥹 the game had an amazing vibe and a ton of chase scenes that were absolutely thrilling, it was an awesome game! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: From tycoons to students, Nigerians are scrambling to be par…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
From tycoons to students, Nigerians are scrambling to be part of billionaire Aliko Dangote's $40 billion IPO of his refinery business.

Can the once-in-a-generation listing transform African markets?

🔜 bloom.bg/4vz9qoK
item.content:encoded:
From tycoons to students, Nigerians are scrambling to be part of billionaire Aliko Dangote's $40 billion IPO of his refinery business.

Can the once-in-a-generation listing transform African markets?

🔜 bloom.bg/4vz9qoK

item.title: 7月01日 水曜日☁☂️ 室温28.3℃ １勤目終了なり。。。 蒸し暑かった〜🫠 疲れますた…🫠 今日も1日お疲れ様…
item.author: 菊理（くくり）スランプ脱出中 (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月01日 水曜日☁☂️
室温28.3℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
蒸し暑かった〜🫠
疲れますた…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠
item.content:encoded:
7月01日 水曜日☁☂️
室温28.3℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
蒸し暑かった〜🫠
疲れますた…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

item.title: 7月4日(土)21時〜ピクリエにて開催されるオンラインイベント『うたかた創作マルシェ2』に参加します。スペースは『C-6…
item.author: キノサキ@うたかた創作マルシェ2 (@kinosaki-n.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月4日(土)21時〜ピクリエにて開催されるオンラインイベント『うたかた創作マルシェ2』に参加します。スペースは『C-6』
今回のイベントより、5月の関西コミティアで初頒布した新作試し読みコピー本『オオサカウーロンズ August-準備号-』のWEB展示を追加いたしました。本文内容は頒布したコピー本とほぼ同じですが、まえがきをカットし読みやすく修正しております。あとはネップリ登録しているイラストが7月仕様に変わった程度でいつも通りのラインナップ。
どこかのタイミングでイベント会場に顔を出せたらなと思っておりますので、よければ遊びに来て下さいませ！
※各種リンクはリプ欄に
#うたかた創作マルシェ
item.content:encoded:
7月4日(土)21時〜ピクリエにて開催されるオンラインイベント『うたかた創作マルシェ2』に参加します。スペースは『C-6』
今回のイベントより、5月の関西コミティアで初頒布した新作試し読みコピー本『オオサカウーロンズ August-準備号-』のWEB展示を追加いたしました。本文内容は頒布したコピー本とほぼ同じですが、まえがきをカットし読みやすく修正しております。あとはネップリ登録しているイラストが7月仕様に変わった程度でいつも通りのラインナップ。
どこかのタイミングでイベント会場に顔を出せたらなと思っておりますので、よければ遊びに来て下さいませ！
※各種リンクはリプ欄に
#うたかた創作マルシェ

item.title: Public trust in science can’t be sustained by the support of…
item.author: Nature (@nature.com)

item.content:encoded:

item.title: スガキヤ関東進出、勝算は「そのままの味」 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO... 東海地方を…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
スガキヤ関東進出、勝算は「そのままの味」
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

東海地方を中心に展開するラーメン店・スガキヤ。

過去関東に出店した際には関東向けなのか名古屋メシなのかメニューの軸が定まりませんでした。

今回の再進出では「ファストフードのように手軽」なラーメンを提供します。
item.content:encoded:
スガキヤ関東進出、勝算は「そのままの味」
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

東海地方を中心に展開するラーメン店・スガキヤ。

過去関東に出店した際には関東向けなのか名古屋メシなのかメニューの軸が定まりませんでした。

今回の再進出では「ファストフードのように手軽」なラーメンを提供します。

item.title: Hola a todos. Hoy recién me puse tratar de terminar el dibuj…
item.author: エルさん (Eru-san) (@bsdmoe.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hola a todos. Hoy recién me puse tratar de terminar el dibujo después de mi trabajo aunque no pude terminar, por lo menos les comparto un adelanto de mas o menos va a quedar🙂

Ayer estuve distraído por el partido de Paraguay que gano, yo al menos no esperaba que ganara pero lo hizo épicamente😳
item.content:encoded:
Hola a todos. Hoy recién me puse tratar de terminar el dibujo después de mi trabajo aunque no pude terminar, por lo menos les comparto un adelanto de mas o menos va a quedar🙂

Ayer estuve distraído por el partido de Paraguay que gano, yo al menos no esperaba que ganara pero lo hizo épicamente😳

item.title: This is Penny. She came up with her own trick. Really hopes …
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Penny. She came up with her own trick. Really hopes you like it, and will repeat it as many times as necessary until you acknowledge that you do. 14/10 (IG: pennycorgipoo)
item.content:encoded: This is Penny. She came up with her own trick. Really hopes you like it, and will repeat it as many times as necessary until you acknowledge that you do. 14/10 (IG: pennycorgipoo)

item.title: Leonard Leo is a lawyer, but he's never argued a case in cou…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Leonard Leo is a lawyer, but he's never argued a case in court. He's never held elected office.

But for years he rebuilt the American legal system, resulting in the Supreme Court's right-wing supermajority.

(Published Oct. 2023)
item.content:encoded:
Leonard Leo is a lawyer, but he's never argued a case in court. He's never held elected office.

But for years he rebuilt the American legal system, resulting in the Supreme Court's right-wing supermajority.

(Published Oct. 2023)

item.title: Anyone saying they want to do a genital check on kids before…
item.author: Matt (@mattlibrarian.eurosky.social)
item.description: Anyone saying they want to do a genital check on kids before they can play on a sports team needs to get a throat punch and be curb-stomped until they change their shitty life choices

Take all the time you need.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Erling Haaland savors the moment after Norway wins a knockou…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Erling Haaland savors the moment after Norway wins a knockout game at the World Cup for the first time, a celebration that included a horned helmet atop his head and again sitting on the field with teammates to do the Viking Row.
item.content:encoded: Erling Haaland savors the moment after Norway wins a knockout game at the World Cup for the first time, a celebration that included a horned helmet atop his head and again sitting on the field with teammates to do the Viking Row.

item.title: Assistindo a copa pelo futebol:
item.author: escrivitinho em clima de copa 💚💛 (@ohobitinho.bsky.social)
item.description: Assistindo a copa pelo futebol:

item.title: Trump has previously claimed a ruling against him would be “…
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: Trump has previously claimed a ruling against him would be “not Economically sustainable for the United States of America.”
item.content:encoded: Trump has previously claimed a ruling against him would be “not Economically sustainable for the United States of America.”

item.title: I’m old enough to recognise this as a data centre
item.author: Disappointed Optimist (@disappoptimism.bsky.social)

item.title: The Ealing Beaver Project says, since the mammals moved in, …
item.author: Laura Phillips (@lauraphillips.bsky.social)
item.description: The Ealing Beaver Project says, since the mammals moved in, Greenford station, downstream from the animals' wetland home at Paradise Fields, no longer floods after heavy rain.
item.content:encoded: The Ealing Beaver Project says, since the mammals moved in, Greenford station, downstream from the animals' wetland home at Paradise Fields, no longer floods after heavy rain.

item.title: Today as I was waiting for 12yo to find books at the library…
item.author: Kimiko Shibata (@eslfairy.bsky.social)
item.description: Today as I was waiting for 12yo to find books at the library, a small child came over and asked me what I was reading, then shoved a book in my hand to read to her instead. So I read it to her. Then another little girl came over with a book. Anyways, now I’m the Book Lady.
item.content:encoded: Today as I was waiting for 12yo to find books at the library, a small child came over and asked me what I was reading, then shoved a book in my hand to read to her instead. So I read it to her. Then another little girl came over with a book. Anyways, now I’m the Book Lady.

item.title: Tom Kean Jr. sought help for depression. He hasn’t made it e…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: Tom Kean Jr. sought help for depression. He hasn’t made it easy for others to do the same. The lawmaker spent nearly two decades voting against paid leave.
item.content:encoded: Tom Kean Jr. sought help for depression. He hasn’t made it easy for others to do the same. The lawmaker spent nearly two decades voting against paid leave.

item.title: The oceans are hot, this should be all we talk about today
item.author: Athena Kugblenu (@athenakugblenu.bsky.social)
item.description: The oceans are hot, this should be all we talk about today
item.content:encoded: The oceans are hot, this should be all we talk about today
